videos.description:
Love finds its way in the most unexpected places... even in the
disciplined life of a cadet! Naina Bole is a soulful melody that captures
the innocent yet intense emotions of young cadets as they find
themselves enchanted by their graceful dance teacher, played by the
stunning Ankita Lokhande.
A mesmerizing composition by Shreyas Puranik and lyrics penned by
Shreyas Puranik and Prashant Ingole, this song beautifully expresses
how unspoken words are conveyed through the language of the eyes.

videos.description:
Presenting the Most Iconic Scenes from the Blockbuster Hit Movie "AIRLIFT", Starring Akshay Kumar and Nimrat Kaur. 

A 2016 Indian patriotic movie film directed by Raja Krishna Menon. 

The film captures the story of the Indians stuck in Kuwait during first Gulf War of 1990 August, through the eyes of Ranjit Katiyal and a few other characters. 

This is a story about how these Indians, with the help of Ranjit Katiyal, managed to survive the Iraqi invasion, and against all odds, move across Iraq
